title: sutera breviflora
intro: Sutera breviflora, also known as the Cape Sutera or Sutera, is a flowering plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its various health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have medicinal properties that can help with wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Sutera breviflora can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal benefits.
